title: Social Media | Respiratory Illnesses | CDC
text:
al Flu 
Respiratory Syncytial Virus (RSV) 
Respiratory Illnesses 
Social Media 
Dec. 22, 2025 
What to know 
These sample social media posts and graphics highlight information and stories related to respiratory viruses like flu, COVID-19, and RSV. We encourage you to share these messages on your organization's social media platforms.
Messaging and graphics 
Looking for content to promote respiratory illness messaging to your social media audiences? We've got you covered.
